{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/102931302?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Quasar0147/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Quasar0147/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Quasar0147/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Quasar0147/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Quasar0147", "id": 102931302, "login": "Quasar0147", "node_id": "U_kgDOBiKbZg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Quasar0147/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Quasar0147/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Quasar0147/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Quasar0147/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Quasar0147/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Quasar0147", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42553", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "### Impact
A remote authenticated attacker who shares a room with a victim and has permissions to create room emotes (for example in a DM) can cause the victim's client to send their Matrix access token to an attacker-controlled server. This occurs when the victim opens the emoji or sticker picker for the room containing a malicious emote pack. 

The root causes are: 

(1) an incorrect fallback in EmojiBoard that uses untrusted `pack.meta.avatar` (user-controlled) without converting/validating it as an MXC URL, allowing arbitrary HTTP(S) URLs to be used; and 

(2) the service worker attaching the user's Authorization bearer token to all outbound GET requests whose URL contains `/_matrix/client/v1/media/download` or `/_matrix/client/v1/media/thumbnail` without verifying the request host matches the configured homeserver origin. An attacker-controlled URL containing those path fragments and permissive CORS will receive the victim's Authorization header (access token). 

Impacted users: anybody using affected Cinny web app versions who opens the emoji/sticker picker in a room containing a malicious emote pack and who is logged in (authenticated).

### Patches
Version with fixes: https://github.com/cinnyapp/cinny/releases/tag/v4.10.3", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00302, "percentile": 0.21653}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j944-w549-3453", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-07T16:40:52Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j944-w549-3453", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j944-w549-3453"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42553"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-27T18:16:22Z", "published_at": "2026-05-07T16:40:52Z", "references": ["https://github.com/cinnyapp/cinny/security/advisories/GHSA-j944-w549-3453", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42553", "https://github.com/cinnyapp/cinny/releases/tag/v4.10.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j944-w549-3453"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/cinnyapp/cinny/security-advisories/GHSA-j944-w549-3453", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/cinnyapp/cinny", "summary": "Cinny vulnerable to access token disclosure via invalidated emoji pack avatar URL in service worker", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:47:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j944-w549-3453", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.10.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "cinny"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.10.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Cinny vulnerable to access token disclosure via invalidated emoji pack avatar URL in service worker
